title: Lexicographical Numbers
content:
Given an integer n, return all the numbers in the range [1, n] sorted in lexicographical order.

You must write an algorithm that runs in O(n) time and uses O(1) extra space.

Example 1:

Input: n = 13
Output: [1,10,11,12,13,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9]
Example 2:

Input: n = 2
Output: [1,2]

Constraints:

• 1 <= n <= 5 * 104

solutions.explanation: Start at 1. Try to go deeper by multiplying by 10. When stuck, backtrack and increment.
solutions.complexity: Time: O(n). Space: O(1) excluding output.
